requirements: R1: executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R5: leads_to(tree, 'check banking privileges', 'check credit worthiness')
R6: leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'evaluate loan risk level')
R7: (executed_by(tree, 'check banking privileges', 'credit broker')) or (executed_by(tree, 'check banking privileges', 'supervisor'))
R9: executed_by(tree, 'check acceptable risks', 'branch office manager')
R10: (leads_to(tree, 'check acceptable risks', 'approve request')) or (leads_to(tree, 'check acceptable risks', 'reject request'))
R13: by_due_date(tree, 'sign loan contract', '7 working days', 'close offer')
R16: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (supervisorCheckPerformed == false)', 'create suspense file')
R19: data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(customerStatus == "gold") and (loanRequestAmount < 1000000)', 'evaluate loan risk level')
